title: Lead Investment Banker at EY India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at EY India
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
